calendar.matters:
The 2016 Kennth M. Edlin Trust
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kelly Dixon specially appearing for Liza De Vries on behalf of Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $1,828,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed June 7, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,740,000.00 is required (additional bond amount calculated by Ms. Dixon in open Court).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
